compiled_state.title: Delete test-locked orphan: ticket-conflict-log.py
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Nothing writes or reads conflict-resolutions.jsonl except this module + its test; no engine code performs the importlib dance its docstring prescribes. The conflict-resolution path it logged now lives in the reducer without logging. RECOMMEND delete module + tests/scripts/test_ticket_conflict_log.py. (If conflict observability is wanted later, wire it into ticket-sync.sh reconvergence as new work.)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Module + test deleted (or an explicit adopt decision recorded with wiring ticket)
- [ ] Full suite green
